title: Hephaestus v0.6 Candidate Manifest
description: Manifest for a v0.6 candidate — the atomic unit of mutation in the Promotion Engine (BE-2 #85). All promotion decisions read this manifest. Defines the lifecycle state machine and the fields required to evaluate preconditions (effect_class, base_state_current, merge_policy, rollback_pointer, observation_window).

schema_version.description: Schema version number. Bumped on breaking changes per README schema-bump procedure.

source_hypothesis.description: Hypothesis id (from db.hypotheses / templates/hypothesis.yaml) that motivated this candidate.

workspace.description: Workspace in which the candidate was authored. Either 'beliefs' (Orchestrator-managed) or a project-specific workspace from adapters/*/project.yaml.

base_state.description: Snapshot of the state the candidate is built against. The Promotion Engine's base_state_current precondition (A-5 #80) verifies that base_state.hash equals current_active_state.hash at promotion time. If they differ, the candidate transitions to REBASE_REQUIRED.

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonical base state (per asset_type, see A-3 #78).

captured_at_tick.description: Tick id at which the base was captured.

effect_class.description: From A-1 (#76). irreversible_external is human-only; human_always remains true for this class. compensable_external requires compensation_plan + standing_policy to be auto-promotable under AFK.

compensation_plan.description: REQUIRED iff effect_class == compensable_external. Records how the promotion can be undone in practice.

compensator.description: Role or component name that owns the compensation.

standing_policy.description: REQUIRED iff effect_class != reversible_internal. Adapter-scoped policy reference, non-empty. Format: policy://<adapter>/<policy_name>.

human_always.description: REQUIRED and MUST be true iff effect_class == irreversible_external. Preserved from pre-v0.6; this contract does NOT weaken it.

expected_delta.description: Self-description of what this candidate is expected to change. Used by the Promotion Engine and T4 disposition to estimate risk.

evidence.description: Free-form evidence supporting the candidate. Required for EVICT intents under #63 unless actor is human (per A-2 #77 exception).

promotion_preconditions.description: From A-5 (#80). base_state_current MUST be true at promotion time; merge_policy gates unattended execution; kill/pause/freeze MUST be clear.

base_state_current.description: Engine verifies candidate.base_state.hash == current_active_state.hash at promotion time. If false, candidate -> REBASE_REQUIRED.

merge_policy.description: From A-3 (#78). pr_gated_auto requires effect_class != irreversible_external AND a non-empty compensation_plan for compensable_external candidates.

kill_pause_freeze_clear.description: From A-4 (#79). Engine reads templates/control.yaml:mode AND db.control_state:mode; OR'd, then negated. True means neither surface reports killed/paused/frozen.

shadow_plan.description: How this candidate will be SHADOWING'd before promotion. SHADOWING runs the candidate's effect in an isolated environment; fail returns to ROLLED_BACK or DISCARDED.

canary_plan.description: How the candidate is CANARY'd after SHADOWING but before full PROMOTED. Fail returns to ROLLED_BACK.

rollback_pointer.description: From BE-3 (#86). Pointer to the snapshot manifest captured before promotion; enables atomic rollback. Must be present before any state transition out of PROPOSED.

storage.description: From DL-3 (#96). s3 = S3-compatible (MinIO local), fs = filesystem.

observation_window.description: After PROMOTED, the candidate enters OBSERVING. If a regression is detected within window_ticks, it transitions to ROLLED_BACK. If STABLE, it transitions to RETAINED.

status.description: Current lifecycle state. PROPOSED -> MATERIALIZING -> MATERIALIZED -> VERIFYING -> (DISCARDED | SHADOWING) -> (DISCARDED|ROLLED_BACK | CANARY) -> (ROLLED_BACK | PROMOTED) -> OBSERVING -> (ROLLED_BACK | RETAINED). REBASE_REQUIRED (A-5 #80) is reachable from any pre-PROMOTED state. DEAD is terminal failure requiring re-author.

state_history.description: Append-only log of state transitions. Each entry: {from, to, tick, actor, reason}.

merge_policy.description: Per-candidate override of the asset_type's default merge_policy (see A-3 #78). Set to pr_gated_auto only for AFK-eligible candidates.

allOf.description: If effect_class == irreversible_external, human_always MUST be true.
If effect_class == compensable_external, compensation_plan and standing_policy are REQUIRED.
